name: Done Drift
tagline: Offline task board for lightweight daily work.
problemSolved: Small daily tasks often get scattered across notes, chats, and memory. Done Drift keeps the workflow intentionally lightweight so a user can quickly write down what matters, filter open or completed work, and close the loop as tasks get done.
challengesSurmounted: The main challenge was keeping the app small while still making it feel useful. The final version includes local persistence, filters, empty states, task cleanup, task renaming, and a responsive layout without a build system or external dependencies.
